A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

title: Honkai: Star Rail
notes:
The brand-new Version 4.3 "The Lethe Below the Living" is now available!
New Character: Mortenax Blade (Nihility: Fire)
Character Rerun: Yao Guang (Elation: Physical), Cyrene (Remembrance: Ice), Phainon (Destruction: Physical)
New Story: Trailblaze Mission "Planarcadia" - "The Lethe Below the Living"
New Events: Pixel Plane Rumble, Wispae Amusement Park, and more
Others: New maps, new enemies, new stages, and more

title: Mega Evo: Journey
notes: Fix the issue found;

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!

title: Lands of Jail
notes: Update game content.

title: Glow Fashion Idol
notes:
We’re thrilled to unveil the newest update for Glow! Here’s what’s new:
Step into a sweet world of style with the Candyland event, Zodiac-inspired looks, dazzling mazes, and exciting fashion challenges!
Explore fresh collections, exclusive VIP offers, and special Birthstone rewards.
Compete in events and elevate your fashion journey!
And as usual, more improvements & enhancements.

title: Kingdom Guard:Tower Defense TD
notes:
[Optimization]
1. Optimized the Theme Packs event and event item CONTENT.
2. Optimized the airship and DAILY card interface; the price will now be displayed when you renew.

notes: Fixed detected bugs and optimized the gameplay experience

title: Plants vs. Zombies™ 2
notes:
The plants have come up with a bold plan - they’re taking over ZCorp! Zomboss has turned the office into a brain-hungry battlefield! Fight through tricky zombie tactics, power up your plants, and show Zomboss who’s boss!

NEW PLANT:
Thorn Whip - Early Access - 6/8/26 - 6/21/26

ARENA:
Thorn Whip Season - 6/22/26 - 7/12/26
Tournament of Champions! - 7/13/26 - 8/9/26


THYMED EVENTS:
ZCorp Takeover - 6/8/2026 - 6/28/2026
Summer Nights - 6/29/2026 - 7/19/2026

UPDATES:
Bug Fixes, & more!

title: Call of Dragons
notes:
1.Soccer Summer Event Series
Take part in the Lucky Ball Machine event to earn exclusive rewards, including the Avatar Frame and Nameplate "Moment of Victory"!
2.Super Striker Event
Enjoy the brand new limited-time Super Striker event and take to the field in a penalty shootout!
3.New Legacy of Agoru Cross-Server Event
Prepare for a battle that transcends dimensions! In this clash of worlds, two Realms battle for supremacy!
4.New Decorations

title: Cooking Madness-Kitchen Frenzy
notes:
A new update is available for Cooking Madness!

A brand-new restaurant is opening in Serene Switzerland!
- Wander through the streets of Geneva, and enjoy Swiss jam cookies, carrot cakes, and other delicious treats!

Quality-of-life changes:
- Enhanced system performance and gameplay mechanics.

Have fun cooking, Chefs!

title: Top Tycoon: Coin Theme Empire
notes:

Keep your game updated to enjoy all the great features!
If you’re enjoying "Top Tycoon," we’d love to hear your thoughts! :)
